display_text: Platemail, Cost: 1400: Purchased from the Secret Shop. Provides +10 bonus Armor, offering a significant boost to physical damage resistance for a single component item. Useful for heroes looking to increase survivability against right-click carries or to build into high-tier defensive items. Stats: Armor: +10.
search_text: armor item, physical defense, physical resistance, plate mail, secret shop item, defensive component, tank item, armor boost, armor stat, physical damage reduction, armor component, Platemail

display_text: Platemail, Cost: 1400: A core defensive component for survivability-focused heroes. Its raw +10 armor makes it a cost-effective way to dramatically increase Effective HP (EHP) against physical damage. It builds into several high-value late-game items like Assault Cuirass and Shiva's Guard.
search_text: armor component item, high armor, build component, tank build, defensive build, physical survivability, physical tank, EHP increase, armor value, Platemail

display_text: Platemail, Cost: 1400: Excels in team fights against lineups heavy on physical and attack damage. Provides the highest single-component armor value, making it a strong defensive spike for front-line heroes who need to absorb damage. Particularly effective for Strength heroes to amplify their high HP pool with armor.
search_text: team fight armor, physical lineup counter, carry counter item, front line item, tanky item, damage soak, physical damage team fight, Platemail

display_text: Platemail, Cost: 1400: Situational pickup against lineups dominated by right-click cores (e.g., Drow Ranger, Terrorblade) or against heroes who build Desolator. Counteracts armor reduction and burst physical damage, allowing squishier supports to survive longer when facing heavy physical threats.
search_text: vs physical damage item, anti-carry armor, desolator counter, armor reduction counter, right click counter, physical burst defense, Platemail
